title: Real Jungle Animals Hunting
description: The beast wounded at jungle was lying where the hunter had left him; but whether he was still alive, whether he was strong or merely lying low, the hunter did not know. The hunter stood nearby the beast confirming about his big game... Hunting Wild Animals is the game for big game hunters who loves outdoor adventures where they hunt furious beasts. This game is real hunting and shooting experience which you might not been able to get in your real life. Those who could not risk their life in hunting wild animals in real world - can enjoy real hunting experience by playing this stunning FPS hunting simulator on Android! ★★★ The Story ★★★ You are a retired army officer living in hillside jungle between mountains to spend rest of your life enjoying your hunting passion. Currently you posses one sniper rifle which you will use in big game hunt today - if you use your army tactics of shooting in hunting on the call of wild then you can easily hunt some rain deer, and other animals like hyena and wolfs. ★★★ Wild Animal Hunting at its best ★★★ Animals consider jungle as their perfect sanctuary. When someone gets into it, they take it as an invader. So you should hold your breath and be patient. Be aware while hunting lions and cheetahs, they will be alert by hearing any sound you create and then they will attack you. Sniping the running animals is a little challenging, so need passions and aim perfectly for shoot down. ★★★ It's Open Hunt Season ★★★ Get Ready for real open hunt season... When hunting You will have two chances only, either you aim perfectly to kill your target animal or get ready to be killed. You are on animal hunt - keep in mind you will have to face wild furious animals also like lion, cheetah, wild bear, Gorilla, & Rino in the forest also so it's not easy to be great wild hunter... It’s open hunting season come join the hunt today! Good Luck... ★★★ Game Features ★★★ • FPS - First Person Shooting • Shooting accuracy and skills • Friendly gun control • Enemy AI (Artificial Intelligence) • 3D Graphics and Sound effects • Real Time Jungle Environment • 8 game play mission with different levels • Game-play is simple yet entertaining • Its hunting season for hunting lion, cheetah, bear and more wild animals ★★★ How To Play ★★★ • Camera zoom to get accurate shots • Easy touch and drag game play to rotate axis • Aim and fire... • Mission based game play to complete all mission PLEASE NOTE: - This game is free to play - This game may not suitable for children. - Advertising appears in this game.
short_description: Return to wilderness in the most visually stunning FPS hunting game on Android!

title: Vert ALPR - Mobile LPR Scanner
description:
Vert ALPR is a new generation of automatic license plate recognition that runs completely on your mobile phone (hand-held or vehicle-mounted). The Vert ALPR app uses an array of state-of-the-art neural networks to recognize and read license plates in real-time, even while driving. Plates are compared against lookup lists in real-time with fuzzy-matching. The only device you need is your phone to carry out LPR.

USING VERT ALPR IS EASY
Vert ALPR works handheld or while driving. If using a vehicle, simply attach your phone to any windshield or dashboard mobile phone mount. The app works in both landscape and portrait mode.

COMPARE AGAINST ALLOW AND DISALLOW (HOT) LISTS IN REAL-TIME
Plate captures and list lookups are done in real-time during scanning. Vert ALPR uses advanced fuzzy-matching techniques for each lookup which allows for partial plate matches.

SEARCH SCAN HISTORY WITH LOCATION
All scans include the original full frame of capture as well as the license plate cropped image. A geolocation tag is also included and displayed on a map. Full and partial plate searches are supported.

MANAGE YOUR ALERT LISTS FROM THE APP
Allow and disallow (hot) lists are managed directly in the Vert ALPR app. You can manage your lists right from the app and can also add or edit individual plates.

GENERATE AND EXPORT REPORTS
If you need to generate and export reports, you can generate a CSV report of your scan history and email it to an appropriate, authorized recipient - all from within the VertALPR app. A record of report generation is also created.


YOUR DATA PRIVACY IS OUR TOP PRIORITY
Vert ALPR is dedicated to the security and privacy of your scan and list data. We use best-in-class encryption and security protocols for all of your data. We do not share or sell any of your images, data, and/or analytics to any third parties.

Vert ALPR is committed to the ongoing improvement of our machine learning model accuracies. If you encounter accuracy issues in your particular region or location, please reach out to our support at https://www.vertalpr.com/contact or email us at support@vertalpr.com.

Vert ALPR is a product of Vert AI Inc.
short_description: Automatic license plate recognition on your phone. Scan plates in realtime.

title: TireCheck: AI Tyre Scanner
description:
Is your tyre safe to drive on? TireCheck helps you check your tyre tread using your phone camera and AI-powered image analysis. No coins, no gauges, no trip to the garage — just point and scan.
Trusted since 2015, TireCheck has helped drivers inspect millions of tyres. Our AI analyses tread ridges and highlights worn areas so you can see potential problems before they become dangerous.
Who uses TireCheck?
Drivers who want a quick, easy way to check tyre condition. Use it before a road trip, as a monthly safety habit, before an MOT or NCT test, when buying a used car, or any time you want peace of mind about your tyres. Works with cars, vans, trucks, and SUVs.
How it works:

Aim your phone camera at the tyre tread using the red target guide
Select which tyre you are checking (front left, rear right, etc.)
Tap to scan or use the 10-second timer for a steady shot
TireCheck analyses the tread and highlights worn zones
Review your result with the saved image

For best results, scan in daylight with a clean, dry tyre.
Features:

AI-powered tread analysis in under 10 seconds per tyre
Visual wear zone highlighting so you can see problem areas
History with saved images — track tyre condition over time
Works with all vehicle types — car, van, truck, SUV
Available in 6 languages: English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, Korean

Tyre safety matters.
Most drivers never check their tyres until something goes wrong. A 10-second scan once a month can help you spot wear early and stay safer on the road. TireCheck makes that easy.
Important: TireCheck provides visual tyre tread guidance to help you assess condition. It is not a precision measurement device and does not replace a physical inspection by a tyre professional. If you have any doubt about your tyre safety, visit a professional.
Subscription:
Try free for 3 days, then choose monthly or yearly. Cancel anytime — no commitment.
Contact: info@assettrac.ie
Website: www.assettrac.ie

title: Backgammon V+
description:
Welcome to the 2025 Edition of Backgammon.  Relieve boredom, have fun and exercise your mind all at the same time with this classic board game.

Backgammon games have been played throughout the world for thousands of years. Continual updates and improvements ensure this remains one of the top versions of Backgammon available. 

In essence Backgammon is a simple race game. The object is to move the pieces around the board towards your inner table. Once all 15 of your pieces have arrived in the inner table, they can be removed from the board. The first player to remove all his pieces from the board is the winner. Although game play is highly skilful, moves rely on the roll of the dice introducing an element of luck. 

A common complaint against all Backgammon dice games is that they cheat. So does it cheat? absolutely not, what would be the point? Still don’t believe us then roll your own dice outside the game and enter those values to play against any of the game levels. Backgammon also keeps track of all the dice rolls so you can check on the game yourself.  

Back gammon is also known as Backgamon, narde, tavli, gammon, nardi, shesh besh! or tavla.

Game features:
* Play against the computer or another human player on the same device.
* Multiple levels of computer play, ranging from beginner to expert.
* High quality artificial intelligence engine particularly at expert level.
* Understands all the official rules of Backgammon, particularly those concerned with bearing off.
* Optional play with doubling dice.
* Support for alternate boards and pieces.
* Full undo and redo of moves.
* Show last move.
* Hints.
* Score card.
* Backgammon is just one of our large collection of best of breed classic board, card and puzzle games available for a wide range of platforms.

title: Gomoku, 5 in a row board game
description:
Welcome to the 2025 Edition of Gomoku. An updated AI and more refined UI bring this classic board game right up to date.  

Learn Gomoku or take on the Gomoku AI this free gomoku game has it all.  Also known as junior go, gobang, renju, caro or five in a line this classic board game is fun for all.

The ancient game of Gomoku is essentially a very simple one, however as you progress you will be surprised at the richness and strategies required in both defence and attack. 

Gomoku is a game for two people playing in opposition. Players take turns placing pieces anywhere on the board. The object of the game is to be the first player to achieve five pieces in a row, horizontally, vertically or diagonally.

Cant see which move to make then try the hint function. Didn’t see the last move, ask Gomoku to show it again. View the game info, game statistics….ok, that’s enough of the 2020 visual puns. 

With support for 3 different board sizes and over 20 levels of game play you are sure to find one that exercises your mind to its limit. 

Game features:
* Play against the computer or another human player on the same device.
* Supports 11x11, 13x13 and 15x15 board sizes allowing for a wide variety in game strategy.
* Over 20 levels of play to suit your mood.
* High quality artificial intelligence engine from acknowledged Gomoku experts.
* Support for alternate boards and pieces.
* Full undo and redo of moves.
* Show last move.
* Hints.
* Gomoku is just one of our large collection of best of breed classic board, card and puzzle games available for a wide range of platforms.
short_description: Classic Gomoku board game also known as five in a row.

title: ReadMe: PDF/EPUB Read Aloud
description:
ReadMe turns your EPUB, PDF and comics into a comfortable reading — and listening — experience.

🎧 Listen like an audiobook (even with the screen off)
Turn any supported EPUB/PDF into spoken audio and keep listening while you walk, work out, commute or do chores. ReadMe can read in the background, so you don’t have to keep the screen on.

🔊 Offline TTS is a core feature
Choose from multiple Text‑to‑Speech engines, including natural‑sounding offline voices in many languages:
• Google TTS (online/offline)
• ReadMe Local TTS (offline)
• Azure TTS (online; may require an account / has limits)
• ElevenLabs TTS (online; may require an account / has limits)
Test voices, pick language, voice and model, and tune speed for your perfect “listening” setup.

📚 Supported formats
• EPUB
• PDF
• CBZ
• CBR

✅ EPUB features
• Table of contents + fast chapter navigation
• Page mode or vertical scrolling
• Remembers your reading position
• Highlights, quotes and bookmarks
• Full‑text search + TTS reading

✅ PDF features
• Smooth page reading + jump to any page
• Progress bar and quick navigation
• Text search / extraction for text‑based PDFs (scanned PDFs may not include selectable text)
• Bookmarks + TTS reading when text is available

✅ Comics (CBZ/CBR)
• Fast, smooth page browsing
• Vertical and horizontal modes
• Smart Comics mode (optional): panel / bubble detection
• Comic bookmarks + reading progress

✨ Library & organization
• Favorites, collections and reading status
• Quotes and bookmarks across your library
• Export quotes to PDF
• Reading settings: fullscreen, orientation, styles and more

Notes:
• Some TTS engines/voices require internet and may have their own pricing/limits.
• For safety, use hands‑free and follow local laws when listening while driving.

Make your books, documents and comics easier to consume — read on screen or listen anywhere with ReadMe.

title: MyBible - Bible
description:
MyBible will help you study the Bible carefully and deeply. It will make the Bible more convenient to read, as you will always have it with you without the need of an Internet connection. Bible translations in more than three hundred languages are available, including the original texts and early translations in ancient Greek, ancient Hebrew, and Aramaic. In MyBible you also have commentaries, biblical dictionaries, thesauruses, daily devotions, and powerful tools to help them all work conveniently together.

Project description and additional information, including the modules format description, as well as the most recent and previous versions of the application, are available at http://mybible.zone.

APPLICATION FEATURES
- Adjustable display of the Bible text, all chapters of a book (not just one chapter at a time); grouping of verses into paragraphs, subheadings, with or without verse numbering; highlighting of Jesus' words, night mode.
- Two or three Bible windows with different translations; windows that automatically synchronize for the current position, but can also be used independently.
- Fast and powerful search of the Bible text.
- Bible text: convenient paging and scrolling, categorized bookmarks, color-highlighting and underlining of fragments, remarks for the text, reading places, user-defined cross references, comparing of selected verses in different translations.
- Ancillary means that can be shown in the Bible text: cross references, hyperlinks to commentaries, footnotes, Strong's numbers.
- Built-in information on the correspondence of the "Russian" and "standard" numbering of verses in the book of Psalms, Job, and Song of Solomon (this provides for parallel reading of these books in Russian and in other languages).
- Bible reading plans: a large selection of pre-defined downloadable reading plans, option to quickly create a simple reading plan of your own, option to activate several reading plans simultaneously, convenient and friendly tracking of your progress on active reading plans.
- Bible commentaries, comparison of different commentaries for a selected verse.
- Showing of dictionary articles on a double-touch of a word in the Bible text, option to search for a word of interest in dictionaries, Strong's lexicon that is activated by a double-touch on a word or on a Strong's number, Strong's number usage searching - capable of replacing a printed "Symphony", option to look up references to a selected verse from dictionary articles - gives input for a deep understanding of integrity of the Scripture.
- Text-to-Speech (TTS): Bible text, commentaries, dictionary articles, daily devotions, and automatic combining of TTS for the Bible text with TTS for commentaries that are shown as hyperlinks in the Bible text (this could be handy while you are driving a long distance).
- Copying of selected verses, copying of verses found as a result of search.
- Working with favorites: daily devotions, commentary articles, dictionary articles.
- Notes entry window with hyperlinks to Bible places that can be created automatically for entered references to Scriptures (e.g., John 3:16).
- Profiles which completely store an environment, settings, a navigation history, etc.
- Extensive set of settings; optional Simplified Mode, for beginners.
- Usage tips for the entire main functionality: available from the menu, grouped, allow searching from a word fragment.
- Support of data back-up and synchronization between different devices of the same user, this includes settings and downloaded modules and assumes usage of external means, (Dropsync is recommended), see the "Synchronization" section in the "About" text available from the menu.
short_description: The most convenient Bible reading and studying software for Android

Currently, we have great positions open in the following industries for you to explore:

- Call Center & Customer Service 
- Creative & Marketing 
- Hospitality 
- Human Resources 
- Industrial & Manufacturing 
- Office & Administrative 
- Warehousing  

Start your job hunt today with the Adecco app. Download it for free, create a profile, upload your resume, and away you go!

KEY FEATURES

- Browse vacancies by job title, description, and location
- Compare job salaries in search results
- Favorite jobs you’re interested in – and browse through them anytime
- Upload your resume from any device
- No CV? Enter your work experience into the app instead

title: Digistore24
description:
Digistore24 vendors and affiliates can use this app to keep track of their online business from anywhere at any time: The Digistore24 app offers full control over transactions, e-tickets, voucher codes, products and the marketplace, no matter where you are.

1. Keep track of all incoming payments
All of your incoming payments are clearly displayed in the app - broken down by days, months, quarters and years. The currency can be switched between EUR, USD and CHF. Ka-ching! Notifications of new incoming payments are sent directly via push notification. 
2. Manage transactions from anywhere
Do you have an urgent question about a transaction that just can’t wait until you’re in the office? It can be answered superfast: All transactions can be conveniently viewed in the app and filtered by order ID, product ID, product name, customer email, first and last name, payment method or currency. 
3. Switch effortlessly between accounts
It’s super easy to view all of your accounts in one place. In the app, you can switch between different accounts and the vendor or affiliate view with a single click. 
4. Monitor your analytics anytime 
Always be able to act: The integrated dashboards provide the perfect overview of all relevant key figures at all times. Depending on the account selected, they adapt automatically and always provide the latest data.
5. Ticketing made easy
Ticket scanning has never been easier: Digistore24 e-tickets can be scanned and recorded directly with the app. This means that every step can be taken care of with just one piece of software! Creating and selling tickets in the web application plus validation and admission control is easy using the app. 
6. Manage discount codes on the go
Want to run a spontaneous discount campaign? This can be implemented quickly, as all discounts can be created, edited, copied, deleted or searched for directly in the app.
7. Manage marketplace listings anytime
Stay on top of everything: Create or edit your product marketplace listings on the go, and as an affiliate, find the right products for your affiliate marketing while on the move.

Digistore24 is a European automation and affiliate marketing platform for digital products, seminars and software. All Digistore24 users use the app free of charge and are always well-informed about the online company.

title: TRANSFLO Mobile+
description:
Transflo® Mobile+ is a complete trucking solution rolled into one convenient mobile app. It starts with the on-the-go scanning solutions you need with the fastest document delivery available. Plus we’ve added in the features you need like accident and OS&D submission, load review and acceptance, integrated navigation (CoPilot) designed specifically for trucking routes, weigh station bypass technology (Drivewyze), two-way messaging with your fleet or broker and fuel finder perks like myPilot and Love’s Connect. 
Our integrated navigation (powered by CoPilot Truck Navigation) works 24 hours a day and is designed specifically for trucks. Our navigation software takes into account the dimensions of each truck (for preventing accidents), driver fuel needs and trucker-friendly rest areas – all while offering users real-time traffic, PC*Miler trusted route options, and full GPS map access even if data signal is lost.
Transflo® Mobile+ is proud to offer the easiest and most advanced weigh station bypass solution in the industry. Powered by Drivewyze, our bypass feature uses geo-fencing technology that notifies drivers when they are within two miles of a designated weigh station. That means no stopping, no wasting time and no unnecessary fees for safe drivers. 
For when you do need to weigh, save time with the new Weigh My Truck features (through CAT Scale®) without ever leaving the Transflo® Mobile+ app. This integration allows commercial drivers to weigh their trucks at over 1,800 locations throughout the U.S. and Canada. 
With Transflo® Mobile+ you’ll get notifications when there are available loads. Just accept or decline them right on your smartphone or tablet! With a simple swipe, drivers can also let their carriers or brokers know which leg of the trip they’re on. We've included the ability to view both destinations on the map and truck stops along the way to better help drivers plan their day. 
Transflo® Mobile+ can be used by drivers to send paperwork, and photos for accidents and OS&D, to carriers. We’ll walk you through the process with necessary data input and allow you to take photos or upload existing photos for your accident or OS&D submissions. After submitting documents for accidents or OS&D, a unique confirmation number and email notification is generated allowing images to be viewed for up to 14 days.
Note: Your fleet or broker must be authorized to use Transflo® Mobile+ for you to access these features. Registration follows the same process as Transflo® Mobile+. You will need a Fleet or Broker ID. A Fleet ID can be obtained from your driver manager or office personnel. Carriers will be provided with a Broker ID from an authorized broker or from Pegasus TransTech.
Transflo® Mobile+ supports Driver Hours of Service when using a Transflo® T7 ELD device. With an HOS feature the app will automatically switch a driver to ON DUTY DRIVING mode when detecting a driving pattern (12mph for 5 seconds or more) and back to ON DUTY NOT DRIVING when detecting driving has stopped for at least 5 minutes.
Transflo® image optimization improves legibility even for carbon-copied documents, and documents with light gray text on a color background (blue, yellow, green, pink, etc.)

title: Bridge Card Game
description:
How to play the bridge card game - free & offline game for beginners & adults 🤔:

🙋‍♂️ Bridge Card Game is a cousin of Bid Whist and Spades as they are all derived from the age old game of whist. The goal of a Bridge Card Game (also known as Contract Bridge or Rubber Bridge) is to be the team (partnership) at the end of the match with the most total points. The match (called a rubber) ends when a team wins 2 bridge card games. A game is won by getting a "contract" score of 100 or more points over several deals if necessary.

Game Tutorial:
✔️ Goals of bidding of a classic bridge card game:
At the beginning of a deal, you must state the number of "tricks" you think your team can win with a specific "trump suit". A bid includes a number (1-7) and a trump suit (or no trump, NT). The team that makes the final bid must win at least that number of tricks plus 6. The final highest bid is known as the "contract". 

✔️Bidding Process
Each player can either bid or pass when it's their turn. Alternately, each player could double their opponents most recent bid. The opponents' team can then redouble the bid. Under double or redouble, that game rewards double or quadruple points respectively. The bidding ends when 3 players in a row pass. The player that makes the first bid of the trump suit is called the "declarer".

✔️Gameplay
The player to the declarer's left chooses a card from their hand to lead the first trick. After that, the declarer's partner's hand is placed on the table (called the "dummy hand") and is played by the declarer for the remainder of the deal. Each player must follow the suit of the lead if they are able, otherwise they can play any other suit, including the trump. The trick is won by the highest trump, or if no trumps were played by the highest card of the lead suit. The winner of each trick leads the next trick.


✔️Scoring
The declarer's team gains contract points if they fulfill the contract. Overtrick points are assigned for each trick that was taken above the contract's stated number. Undertrick points are awarded to the declarer's opposing team if the declarer's team does not fulfill the contract. Contract, Over and Under points are further increased for a doubled or redoubled contract.

Base contract scoring for each is as follows. If trumps are clubs or diamonds: 20 per trick. If trumps are hearts or spades: 30 per trick. If Notrump(NT): 40 for the first trick and 30 for each subsequent trick.

After a team scores 100 or more contract points the game is complete and the next game starts. Extra points are awarded for winning a small slam (12 tricks) or a grand slam (13 tricks). Honors points are given for starting the deal with the top 4 or 5 trumps (A K Q J 10). 

We hope you enjoy and learn playing our classic bridge card game. You can play the tournament offline without connecting to the internet or the wifi. It's a great way to practice and improve before playing and competing against your friends in the real world. Don't forget to check our other collections of card games which include Blackjack 21, Gin Rummy, Baccarat, Pyramid Solitaire & Crescent Solitaire.

We have tried to make the computer players (robot) as realistic and challenging as we could using techniques like AI and neural networks.

In case of any issues with the app or feedback please contact our team at hello@thecardgamescompany.com.

title: Maru - ComicViewer/TextReader
description:
This is an app that allows you to open text files, comic files, compressed files, PDF, epub files stored on your Android phone or web server and view them as if they were books.

It does not provide content (novel/manga files) by default.
※ Only Google Play Protect-certified devices are supported.

The main features are as follows.


1. text viewer

  - Support TXT, CSV, SMI, SUB, SRT
  - Support EPUB  (text and picture display), support built-in font
  - Open compressed text (ZIP, RAR, 7Z, ALZ/EGG) directly
  - Changeable fonts (san-serif/serif/custom font), adjust size/spacing/margins etc
  - Changeable character encoding (Auto/UTF-8,...)
  - Changeable text/background color/background image
  - Page turning method: arrow/screen tap/screen drag/volume button
  - Page turning effect (animation) : roll over, slide, swipe, scroll
  - Various Quick navigation: navigation bar, dial, page input
  - Add/rename/sort/lookup bookmarks
  - Text-to-Speech: language selection, speed control, special characters/kanji exclusion
  - Slideshow: adjustable speed
  - Search text: one by one, search all
  - Edit text: edit, add new file
  - Text alignment: left, justified, 2-sheet horizontal view
  - Quick brightness
  - Sentence organization
 

2. comic viewer

  - Support JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, WEBP, TIFF, HEIC, AVIF, ZIP, RAR, 7Z, CBZ, CBR, CB7, ALZ/EGG, PDF files
  - Open compressed pictures (ZIP, RAR, 7Z, ALZ/EGG) directly
  - Support zip streaming
  - Support double compression
  - PDF: zoom up to 8x and sharpen option when zooming in
  - Left-right order/shuffle: left -> right, right->left (Japanese style), landscape 2-page view
  - Support zoom in-out, magnify
  - Page turning method: arrow/scroll tab/scroll drag/volume button
  - Page turning effect (animation): left/right scroll, up/down scroll, webtoon scroll
   Webtoon scroll can smoothly scroll very long pictures.
  - Quick navigation: navigation bar, dial, page input
  - Add/rename/sort/lookup bookmarks
  - Slideshow: set in seconds
  - Keep picture zoomed in
  - Support animated gif/webp/avif
  - Support picture rotation (manual rotation, Auto rotation of JPEG/Webp)
  - Double filter(inversion, sepia, sharpen, ...)
  - Support cropping edge


3. file function

  - Color mark of reading history: red(recent), green(partially read), blue(fully read)
  - Picture Preview: Tiled(Large, Small), Detail
  - Selectable file extension
  - Sorting : Name, Size, Date
  - Support delete rename, copy, move
  - Searching: file name, content, picture
  - Support uncompressing manually
  - Support read or write of USB storage(FAT32,NTFS,exFAT)


4. other

  - Theme/Color
  - Support language selection (Korean, Chinese, Japanese, English, ...)
  - Support Auto Synchornization of reading history
  - Support SFTP (secure file transport protocol)
  - Support FTP (file transport protocol)
  - Support SMB (Windows Shared Folder, Samba)
  - Support WebDAV
  - Support Google Drive
  - Support Dropbox
  - Support MS OneDrive
  - Password lock
  - Support S-pen of Samsung Note 9 and above: page turning, pausing slideshow
  - Headset button support: pausing slideshow
  - Media button (Bluetooth earphone, etc.) support: pausing TTS
  - Backup/restore settings (Maru, Arar compatible)
  - Shortcut management (e.g. add/delete shortcut of other apps)
short_description: Simple! Powerful! ComicViewer/TextReader/PDFViewer/EpubReader

title: Voice Text - Text Voice FULL
description:
VOICE TO TEXT (Talk and write your words as text) 
	-Thanks to "Speech Recognition" you can talk and your words will be converted into characters and written as a text on the screen.
	-Continuous voice recognition.
	-Select different results (interpretations).
	-Better results with Internet, but you can use without Internet (only one result).
	
TEXT TO VOICE (Write or import text and listen to it with the robot voice)
	-Thanks to "Text To Speech" you can type any text which will be spoken by a digital voice.
	-You can add files from your device into the app and read it aloud.
	-Text to speech is very useful for people with no speech communication, since you can write your words and they will be read by the digital voice.
	-Listen to books.

FEATURES
	-Small keyboard scrollable with interchangeable positions.
	-Working with files: txt, pdf, epub, html and open websites.
	-Save notes as file, as audio.
	-List files.
	-Copy audio and text files into the app.
	-Share text and files to others apps on your device. 
	(The application neither synchronize nor save files on the cloud, easily, you can share it to do your own backup).
	
ENGINE(S)
	-Text to Voice depends on the motor(s) or engine(s) of your device (rare case there is none, you must download some).
	
LANGUAGES AND VOICES
	-You can set it in any language and any voice supported for your device and engines.
	-Without Internet you may need to download some languages first.
	-The robot voices can be male or female (this depends on the engines).
	-See Menu-Info if you have troubles. 
	
PREFERENCES
	-See Menu-Preferences to adapt the most personal use.
	
AUDIO RECORDER
	-The app include an Audio Recorder.
	
AUDIO TO TEXT (experimental)
	-An Audio Player is used to play and pause a file so that you can use Voice to Text (red microphone) and capture the results.
	IMPORTANT
	-It is not an automatic conversion.
	-An audio file is not magically converted into a text file in one click.
	-Video to Text is not supported.
	-It is an experimental part.

PERMISSIONS		
	- Write/Read on external storage.		
	- Record using the microphone.

UTILITY
	-Write text that you want to send or share with others apps.
	-Use this app before using others to avoid error typing.
	-It is helpful in your daily use of Android.
	-Speak and take notes without using the keyboard.

PUBLICITY
	-The app has publicity and is free. 
		
Thanks for your suggestions, opinions, comments!
short_description: Take notes with your voice. Listen to texts with digital voice.
